query: SELECT l.id, l.nome, l.numeroLoja FROM lojas l WHERE l.nome NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT ef.nomeLoja FROM eurocodes_fichas ef WHERE ef.analiseId = 810001) ORDER BY l.nome LIMIT 10 OFFSET 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rEtBRZHWZUfGJS.3b07a01772f8 --database 3c9MozLH35e233uWy5WDtH --execute SELECT l.id, l.nome, l.numeroLoja FROM lojas l WHERE l.nome NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT ef.nomeLoja FROM eurocodes_fichas ef WHERE ef.analiseId = 810001) ORDER BY l.nome LIMIT 10 OFFSET 20;
